anchor:
Title: Full Stack Developer - React/Next.js / Tailwind CSS

We are seeking a seasoned full stack developer specializing in cutting-edge frontend technologies. Ideally, you will have experience working with the latest versions of React (17.x+), Next.js (10.x+), and Tailwind CSS (2.x+). Proficiency in CSS-in-JS libraries like styled-components or Emotion is also highly desirable.

You should be familiar with state management libraries such as Redux, MobX, or Zustand. Experience with server-side rendering techniques through Next.js or static site generation with Gatsby would be an advantage.

A strong understanding of UI/UX principles and experience creating responsive designs across multiple devices and screen sizes is essential.

We are looking for a candidate who has achieved proficiency in one or more CSS frameworks beyond Tailwind, such as MDL or BEM. Familiarity with version control systems like Git and experience with Docker for containerization is preferred but not required.

A background in agile development methodologies and proficiency in working within a DevOps environment using tools like Jenkins or GitHub Actions is a bonus.

Remote work flexibility is available, provided you have the necessary tools and infrastructure to perform your duties effectively. We are open to both full-time employees and contract developers with strong project management skills preferred here.

A good understanding of internationalization (i18n) in web applications, especially using libraries like react-i18next or Next.js i18n features, is beneficial.

Start date: As soon as possible
Location: Remote
Remote Policy: Flexible remote work
Security Clearance: Not required

Please tailor your application with your extensive experience working directly on large-scale projects, your proficiency in multiple development tools and technologies mentioned above, and your ability to adapt quickly to changing requirements.

**Senior Software Engineer in Test - QA & Testing (Selenium, Cypress, JUnit)**

We are seeking an experienced Senior Software Engineer in Test to join our dynamic team. You will play a critical role in developing and executing robust testing strategies for our cutting-edge products. The ideal candidate must have a minimum of 8 years of experience in automated testing tools such as Selenium, Cypress, and JUnit.

Key Responsibilities:
- Design, implement, and maintain advanced automated test suites.
- Collaborate with the development team to ensure comprehensive test coverage.
- Identify, analyze, document, and prioritize defects for resolution.
- Work closely with cross-functional teams to drive continuous integration and delivery practices.

 qualifications:
- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or a related field.
- Extensive experience with advanced testing frameworks: Selenium WebDriver (Java/Python), Cypress.io, and JUnit 5.
- Proficiency in scripting languages (JavaScript, Python).
- Experience in developing test automation strategies for large-scale applications.
- Familiarity with continuous integration tools (Jenkins, GitLab CI, CircleCI).
- Strong problem-solving skills with a keen attention to detail.

Preferred Qualifications:
- certifications: Certified Software Tester (CIST), ISTQB Foundation or similar.
- experience working with cloud-based测试解决方案（AWS,Salesforce等）.
- hands-on expertise in DevOps practices.
- proficiency in multiple programming languages and testing methodologies.

This is a full-time, remote position available worldwide. We offer competitive compensation packages, healthcare benefits, and opportunities for professional growth within our innovative environment. If you are ready to be at the forefront of software quality assurance, please apply with your resume highlighting your relevant skills and experience.
